cloudwatch.insightrule.RuleBody.Docs: The definition of the rule, as a JSON object. For details about the syntax, see [ Contributor Insights Rule Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/monitoring/ContributorInsights-RuleSyntax.html) in the *Amazon CloudWatch User Guide*.

cloudwatch.insightrule.RuleState.Docs: The current state of the rule. Valid values are `ENABLED` and `DISABLED`.

cloudwatch.insightrule.Tags.Docs: A list of key-value pairs to associate with the Contributor Insights rule. You can associate as many as 50 tags with a rule.  Tags can help you organize and categorize your resources. For more information, see [ Tagging Your Amazon CloudWatch Resources](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/monitoring/CloudWatch-Tagging.html).  To be able to associate tags with a rule, you must have the `cloudwatch:TagResource` permission in addition to the `cloudwatch:PutInsightRule` permission.
